name: Avicopter Plc
summary: Avicopter Plc manufactures and sells helicopters and fixed aircraft in China. The company offers Z9 helicopters, Y12 light and general aircraft, H425 helicopters, EC120/HC120 helicopters, and ultra-light and ERJ145 regional jet airplanes. It also provides delta winged aircraft with two seats and three seats. The company was formerly known as Hafei Aviation Industry Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Avicopter Plc in December 2014. Avicopter Plc is based in Harbin, China.
